privacyNotice.text: No password is transmitted. The computation is entirely local. The only external request is an anonymous leak check (first 5 characters of the SHA-1 hash, never the password).

footer.tagline: Local computation · HIBP check · Open source

index.title: Test your password strength — Time2Crack
index.description: Analyze the real strength of your password with 7 attack models and 6 hash algorithms. 100% local computation, no password transmitted.

about.title: About Time2Crack — Scientific password crack time estimator
about.description: Discover Time2Crack: the most accurate crack time calculation tool. Scientific methodology, verified academic sources, secure local analysis.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security — Time2Crack
privacy.description: Understand how Time2Crack handles your data: local browser-side calculation, no password transmission, and minimal breach checks.

sources.title: Scientific Sources — Time2Crack
sources.description: Review the scientific references and benchmarks that validate Time2Crack, from cryptography to password-strength estimation.

hibp.title: HIBP Verification — Time2Crack
hibp.description: Check whether a password appears in a data breach with HIBP through an anonymous, privacy-preserving request.

faq.title: FAQ — Time2Crack
faq.description: Answers to common questions about Time2Crack, its local operation, scientific methodology, and calculation results.

generator.title: Secure Password Generator — Time2Crack
generator.description: Generate strong passwords with Time2Crack. Choose character sets, avoid ambiguous symbols, and create secrets tailored to your needs.

how-time2crack-works.title: How Time2Crack Calculates Time — Time2Crack
how-time2crack-works.description: Understand how Time2Crack estimates crack time using attack models, calibrated GPU speeds, and a local calculation engine.

bruteforce.title: Brute Force — Attack Methods — Time2Crack
bruteforce.description: Test every possible combination systematically. The most exhaustive attack and a useful baseline for crack-time estimates.

dictionary.title: Dictionary — Attack Methods — Time2Crack
dictionary.description: Try passwords from curated wordlists and common variants. Fast when the secret is based on known words or patterns.

hybrid.title: Hybrid — Attack Methods — Time2Crack
hybrid.description: Combine a dictionary attack with masks or rules to expand candidates. Effective against predictable tweaks on real words.

mask.title: Mask — Attack Methods — Time2Crack
mask.description: Search only patterns that match a known mask, such as letters, digits, and symbols in fixed positions.

markov.title: Markov — Attack Methods — Time2Crack
markov.description: Generate candidates from transition probabilities learned from real passwords. Balances coverage and speed.

pcfg.title: PCFG — Attack Methods — Time2Crack
pcfg.description: Build candidates from probabilistic grammar patterns learned from password structure. Strong against human-made secrets.

combinator.title: Combinator — Attack Methods — Time2Crack
combinator.description: Combine two wordlists to create larger candidate sets. Useful when passwords are built from multiple words.
